title: Lamb Burger
description: A flavorful lamb burger with a crispy crust and a hint of spices. Perfect for a quick dinner

ingredients.name: Burger Buns
ingredients.notes: you can also use store-bought buns

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Divide the lamb into 4 equal portions and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a patty.
Season the lamb patties with salt and black pepper.
Add the olive oil to the grill and cook the lamb patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the lamb is cooking, toast the flaky pastry on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the burgers by spreading a layer of your favorite toppings on the toasted pastry.
Top with a cooked lamb patty and serve immediately.
